details: Work across the stack on **Manage The Day (MTD)** — a production AI productivity platform on iOS, Android, Web and Desktop, plus its FastAPI backend and an AI planning assistant.
Engineered a **unified multi-provider calendar** merging Google, Apple/CalDAV, Microsoft 365 and on-device iOS (EventKit) into one colour-coded view with drag-and-drop, recurrence and two-way sync.
Integrated **iOS Live Activities / ActivityKit** (Dynamic Island + lock-screen timers) with a mirrored Android foreground service for real-time task tracking.
Built the in-app **AI assistant** (FastAPI + Google ADK / Genkit + Firebase Functions) that manages tasks, goals and projects from natural language and auto-schedules them onto the calendar.
Own the app architecture (BLoC · Provider · Riverpod) and real-time data flow across Firebase Auth, Firestore, Storage and the FastAPI backend.
Shipped features and hardened live **Flutter + GraphQL** products for SaaS clients across iOS and Android.
Built **Crooze** (community fitness challenges) — community/club/individual challenges, leaderboards and automated certificates — and fixed crash loops and state inconsistencies.
Built farmer-facing modules for **AgreEasy** (multilingual B2B agriculture) — sowing requests, land registration, localization and notification reliability.
Resolved **Android Binder transaction failures** by throttling isolate updates and optimising background data processing.
Tuned **GraphQL** queries and caching to cut over-fetching, reducing API latency and payload sizes.
Built **SimbaCourse** end to end — a Flutter (mobile + desktop) client with an Express.js + MongoDB backend, Firebase Auth and AWS S3 for media.
Delivered attendance, enrolment, fees, exams and course management across admin, teacher and student roles.
Owned both frontend and backend: the data model, REST APIs and the shipped cross-platform app.
Worked in a professional engineering workflow — code reviews, CI/CD and agile delivery.
Completed EPAM's six-month campus program in **Advanced Java and Spring Boot**.
Built Spring Boot REST projects — a quiz application and an e-commerce web app — applying OOP, layered architecture and JPA/Hibernate.
Practised professional engineering fundamentals: clean code, version control and code review.
